content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "NIFTY -1.05%, BANK NIFTY -0.81%, India VIX +9.7% to 18.48 — risk-off open with broad weakness across Auto, Realty, Energy, PSU Banks. IT and Pharma defensive but only marginally. Geopolitical premium (US-Iran/India-Pak) is elevated. Book is +0.87% on the day despite tape weakness — winners (PNBHOUSING +10%, COFORGE +10%) carrying the day. Priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs on extended winners, not adding new exposure into a high-VIX risk-off open.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD via no-op — SL 1073.10 is already 1.2% below CMP 1086.10, which satisfies the 1% trail-gap floor. Position at +10.4% with Q4 beat thesis intact (PAT +19%, ICICI BUY target 1350). Not tightening further risks self-stopout; existing SL locks in ~9% gain. Keeping unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replacing no-op MODIFY above with HOLD per rule guidance. SL at 1073 locks in ~9% gain, 1.2% below CMP — adequate trail-gap. Target 1135 still 4.5% upside. Thesis intact, no action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.9%. Stored SL 1352 is 2.3% below CMP 1384 — still within 1% gap floor (good). Order book +30% YoY ($1.75B executable), FY27 margin guidance >20.5%, broker targets 1430-2020. Target 1420 may be conservative given upgrades but it's only 2.6% above CMP — let the position run; will reassess if it breaks 1420. No-op MODIFY converted to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical safe-haven hedge against book's equity beta. -1.2% drawdown, SL 121 (-2.1% from CMP) is appropriate buffer. Hold as portfolio insurance through VIX spike."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, SL at breakeven 820. Q4 beat, raised FY27 guidance via Dabur readthrough, FMCG rotation alive. SL at entry already; target 855 (+2.7% from CMP) within reach. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, SL 3000 just 0.07% below CMP 3002 — VERY tight, but tightening further would breach the 1% trail-gap discipline and tighter is no longer permitted (would cross CMP). FY26 PAT +41.8%, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1 thesis intact. Holding into the noise — if SL fires it fires, won't preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.8%, SL 820 (1% below CMP 828.70) — at the trail-gap floor. Record Q4 revenue, three investor meets May 15-27 as catalysts. Hold; not tightening further given gap floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9%, near SL 1465 (1.2% below CMP 1447.50 — wait, CMP > SL still). Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps, dividend recommended — fundamentals strong, this is intraday noise. SL set at entry; absorb the chop per Rule 17 (no preempt)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, SL 1580 (1.6% below CMP 1621.70). Research flagged NEUTRAL with post-results sector underperformance; binary Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 is long-dated. Hold to SL, no tightening yet — need a real move up before trailing."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL 2755 (1.1% below CMP 2784.50). Q4 beat, +47% FY26 PAT, Rs 2,300 cr capex announced. Sector noise today. Hold at original SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL 9020 (0.9% below CMP 9106) — at the trail-gap floor edge. Q4 record revenue +27%, fresh 52-week high, Rs 47 dividend, Citi target 10,500. Thesis very strong; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, SL 1955 (1.7% below CMP 1999). Q4 standalone +8.5% QoQ, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr, FY27 guidance 25%. Headline PAT -17% due to one-off Rs 490 cr exceptional. Hold per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2%, SL 354 (0.7% below CMP 356.60). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie 415 target. BFSI weak today (banks down). SL is the plan — Rule 17 says hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, SL 10440 (1.2% below CMP 10567). Auto sector -1.36% today is broad weakness. Q4 EBITDA margin 20.8% best-in-class, ~Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000 announced — that's a structural floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, SL 472 (1.9% below CMP 480.95). Q4 PAT +16%, raised FY27 guidance to low double-digit, Rs 5.50 dividend. Strong thesis; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2%, SL 1190 (4.1% below CMP 1241.10). Q4 results pending in May (binary event). Kotak SELL target 800 noted but our position is small. Hold but mindful of binary; will reassess as result date approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1075.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Micro-tighten SL 1073.10 → 1075.00 to round to a cleaner level. CMP 1086.10, new SL 1075 = 1.02% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Locks in ~9.2% gain (vs 9.0% prior). Q4 beat thesis intact, broker targets 1350. Bump is 0.18% on stored SL — borderline micro-adjust per Rule rules; on reflection withdrawing this MODIFY since |new - old|/old = 0.18% is well below 0.5% threshold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1073 already 1.2% below CMP 1086 — at trail-gap floor. Locks in +9% gain. Thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Safe-haven hedge into VIX spike. SL 121 = -2.1% from CMP appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at entry breakeven. FMCG rotation supportive. +1.6%, room to run."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1352 = 2.3% below CMP. +9.9% locked partially. Order book momentum strong."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 3000 very tight (0.07% below CMP). Cannot tighten further without crossing CMP. Defence thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 820 at 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 beat, May investor meets ahead."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+37% PAT). -2.9% is noise; SL 1465 is the plan."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat, SL 1580 below CMP. Hold to SL."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat, SL 2755 = 1.1% below CMP. Q4 strong."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 9020 at trail-gap floor. 52w-high breakout structure intact."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 standalone strong, exceptional charge muddied headline. SL 1955 is plan."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "BFSI weak today, SL 354 will defend. Macquarie target intact."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback at 12000 provides structural floor. SL 10440 is the plan."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat, raised guidance. -1.2% noise."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "+1.2%, SL 1190 below CMP. Q4 results pending — will monitor."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Deployment is 65% (within soft target). New BULLISH candidates surfaced today: DABUR (already held), POLYCAB (already held), BAJAJ-AUTO (already held), CAMS (already held), ABCAPITAL (already held), MARICO (already held), PIDILIT (already held), SRF (already held), GRSE (already held), PNBHOUSING (already held), COFORGE (already held), BHARATFORG (already held) — book ALREADY covers virtually every BULLISH watchlist name. Names NOT held but bullish-rated: NONE materially. THERMAX +11.84% pre-market is interesting but no research data provided. NUVAMA +10.65% same. INFY/HCLTECH IT sector defensive but research not bullish-rated. With VIX +10% and Nifty -1% at open, adding a new full-size CNC into broad risk-off is the wrong tape — preserve dry powder for either (a) a clean reversal signal, or (b) a sharper sell-off creating better entries on existing names. HFCL pending BUY order @ 133.50 still OPEN from 5+ days ago — should investigate cancellation in next cycle (no data on HFCL today).",
  "portfolio_notes": "15 holdings, 65% deployed, +0.87% on day vs -1% NIFTY = clear outperformance from quality stock selection. Cumulative P&L barely positive (+0.68%) but trajectory has improved this week with winners (PNBHOUSING +10%, COFORGE +10%) running. Key risk: BFSI cluster exposure (PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL = 3 names, ~18% of book) — at limit but contained. No new admits today given VIX spike + 9 of 15 positions already showing meaningful unrealized P&L moves that need to play out. Will revisit afternoon if tape stabilizes and any held winners hit targets allowing rotation. HFCL MIS order from 5+ days ago is stale and should be cancelled — flagging for next decision cycle with explicit CANCEL action."
}
